posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
Build My Docs: Automate Your Document Generation on monday.com

Build My Docs is the ultimate app for generating professional PowerPoint (.pptx) and PDF documents directly from your monday.com boards. Say goodbye to manual data entry and hello to one-click document creation.

Why it matters: Boost productivity, save valuable time, and ensure accuracy by automating document creation and delivery workflows.

Schedule a demo to see how Build My Docs enhances your workflows.

Key Benefits

Merge Values: Use simple placeholders to dynamically pull data from your monday.com items directly into your documents.

Live Preview: See a live preview of your document on the item view before creating it, ensuring everything is perfect.

Generated Document Delivery: Save the generated file to a Files column.

Seamless Workflow Integration: Instantly generate and distribute documents when a status changes or a button is clicked.

What You Can Do

  • Create professional .pptx and .pdf documents

  • Automate document generation with a single click

  • Ensure data accuracy with dynamic placeholders

  • Streamline your reporting and communication processes

Who It’s For

  • Project Managers: Automatically generate reports and presentations for stakeholders.

  • Sales Teams: Create customized proposals and contracts with updated client data.

  • HR & Admin: Generate onboarding documents and employee handbooks on the fly.

  • Marketing: Produce campaign reports and brand-aligned presentations effortlessly.

Build My Docs takes the complexity out of document creation, empowering you to focus on your work while ensuring your presentations and reports are always accurate and up-to-date.

App Install Link: https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000943/build-my-docs
